title: Tasty Toasted Korean Doenjang Pancakes
description: A garlicky and bouncy Korean-inspired dish featuring doenjang, perfect for a midnight craving, and made in a tava griddle.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the doenjang, flour, garlic, green onions, and salt until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and water until smooth.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat a tava griddle over medium heat and brush with vegetable oil.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 3-4 minutes on the first side, until the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot and enjoy.
Repeat the cooking process with the remaining batter.
